title: Tragacantha macroura
taxonomy: Tragacantha macroura is a species of plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant is a type of legume, and its classification is further divided into the subfamily Faboideae. The genus Tragacantha is a part of the larger group of legumes, and Tragacantha macroura is one of its species. The classification of Tragacantha macroura is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Fabales, Family: Fabaceae, Subfamily: Faboideae, Tribe: Hedysareae, Genus: Tragacantha, Species: T. macroura. This classification helps in understanding the relationships between different plant species and their evolutionary history.
